blockers.description: 1 regression test fail: RetakeThenPassCertTests.RetakeThenPass_IssuesExactlyOneCertificate — new unique index IX_AssessmentPackages_SessionId_PackageNumber_Unique rejects test fixture that seeds duplicate (sessionId, PackageNumber=1) via two SeedPackageWithResponsesAsync calls (lines 142 + 152)
blockers.workaround: Fix test helper SeedPackageWithResponsesAsync (HcPortal.Tests/RetakeThenPassCertTests.cs:100): compute PackageNumber = (MAX for session) + 1 instead of hardcoded 1. SAFE because grading uses the assigned package's GetShuffledQuestionIds() (GradingService.cs:71-76) + response-driven scoring — orphan package1 ignored. Mirrors production CreatePackage MAX+1.

decisions.decision: Regression fix = patch test fixture, not the index
decisions.rationale: the unique index is correct production behavior; the test seeded now-invalid duplicate package numbers
